---
title: 'Bayesian Method Simulation: Review Results from CSV'
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
  html_document:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = 'center',
  out.width = '85%'
)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r read-data, include=FALSE}
raw_results <- read.csv('simulation_raw_results.csv')
diagnostics_results <- read.csv('simulation_diagnostics.csv')

summary_results <- raw_results |>
  dplyr::group_by(setting_id, truth_type, reader_miss, z_miss, method) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    auc = mean(auc, na.rm = TRUE),
    brier = mean(brier, na.rm = TRUE),
    x_cor = mean(x_cor, na.rm = TRUE),
    x_rmse = mean(x_rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
    cx_mae = mean(cx_mae, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

diagnostics_summary <- diagnostics_results |>
  dplyr::group_by(setting_id, truth_type, reader_miss, z_miss) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_key_rhat = mean(mean_key_rhat, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_key_rhat = max(max_key_rhat, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_bulk_ess = mean(mean_bulk_ess, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_bulk_ess = min(min_bulk_ess, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )
```

Simulation design

```{r design-table}
design_table <- summary_results |>
  dplyr::distinct(setting_id, truth_type, reader_miss, z_miss) |>
  dplyr::arrange(setting_id) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Truth = dplyr::case_when(
      truth_type == 'correct' ~ 'Correctly specified',
      TRUE ~ 'Mildly misspecified'
    ),
    `Reader missingness` = paste0(round(100 * reader_miss), '%'),
    `Z missingness` = paste0(round(100 * z_miss), '%')
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(Setting = setting_id, Truth, `Reader missingness`, `Z missingness`)

knitr::kable(design_table, caption = 'Simulation settings used in the run.', align = 'lccc', booktabs = TRUE) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c('hold_position', 'scale_down'))
```

Results

```{r correct-table}
correct_table <- summary_results |>
  dplyr::filter(truth_type == 'correct') |>
  dplyr::select(Setting = setting_id, Method = method, AUC = auc, Brier = brier, `X cor` = x_cor, `X RMSE` = x_rmse, `C_X MAE` = cx_mae)

knitr::kable(correct_table, digits = 3, caption = 'Average performance under correctly specified truth.', booktabs = TRUE) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c('hold_position', 'scale_down'))
```

```{r misspecified-table}
misspecified_table <- summary_results |>
  dplyr::filter(truth_type == 'misspecified') |>
  dplyr::select(Setting = setting_id, Method = method, AUC = auc, Brier = brier, `X cor` = x_cor, `X RMSE` = x_rmse, `C_X MAE` = cx_mae)

knitr::kable(misspecified_table, digits = 3, caption = 'Average performance under mildly misspecified truth.', booktabs = TRUE) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c('hold_position', 'scale_down'))
```

```{r auc-plot}
summary_results |>
  ggplot(aes(x = setting_id, y = auc, group = method, shape = method)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  labs(x = 'Setting', y = 'Average AUC', shape = 'Method') +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14))
```

```{r brier-plot}
summary_results |>
  ggplot(aes(x = setting_id, y = brier, group = method, shape = method)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  labs(x = 'Setting', y = 'Average Brier score', shape = 'Method') +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14))
```

```{r convergence-table}
conv_table <- diagnostics_summary |>
  dplyr::select(
    Setting = setting_id,
    `Mean key R-hat` = mean_key_rhat,
    `Max key R-hat` = max_key_rhat,
    `Mean bulk ESS` = mean_bulk_ess,
    `Min bulk ESS` = min_bulk_ess
  )

knitr::kable(conv_table, digits = 3, caption = 'Convergence summary for key model parameters.', booktabs = TRUE) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c('hold_position', 'scale_down'))
```
